description: Europe's largest healthcare booking platform with 300,000+ healthcare providers. Offers appointment scheduling, video consultations, patient records, and practice management tools.
business_model: B2B - SaaS subscription to healthcare providers; B2C free for patients
target_market: French and German healthcare providers (GPs, specialists, hospitals)
competitive_advantage: Dominant market position in France/Germany, network effects, full practice management suite

varden_fit.rationale: Potential distribution partner in France - controls patient flow to most practices
